evals.description: Triggers on account plan creation request
evals.prompt: Help me build an account plan for our largest enterprise customer. They're up for renewal in 6 months.
How do I map stakeholders at a large enterprise account? I only have one contact there.
I have a QBR with a key account next week. What should I prepare and how should I structure it?
One of my accounts is really happy with us. How do I identify and pitch an expansion opportunity?

evals.description: Triggers on renewal management request and provides timeline
evals.prompt: My biggest account renews in 90 days. What should I be doing right now?

evals.description: Warns against starting renewal too late
evals.prompt: My customer's renewal is in 30 days and I haven't started the conversation yet. What do I do?

evals.description: Provides health scoring framework with signal categories
evals.prompt: How do I build an account health score to predict which customers might churn?

evals.description: Triggers on at-risk account / save playbook request
evals.prompt: A customer just told me they're considering canceling. How do I save this account?

evals.description: Advises against leading QBR with product demo
evals.prompt: Should I use the QBR to demo our new product features to the customer?
How should I prioritize my time across a book of 50 accounts with very different sizes?

evals.description: Advises against expanding before value is proven
evals.prompt: We just closed a new enterprise customer last month. Can I already start pitching them on our premium tier?

evals.description: References qbr-template.md for detailed QBR deck structure
evals.prompt: Give me a complete QBR deck template with every slide laid out.
